data.title: Coppernico Options Key Concessions at Sombrero
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 09, 2026, Coppernico Metals Inc. (TSX: COPR, OTCQB: CPPMF, FSE: 9I3) announced its acquisition of an option for mineral concessions totaling 600 hectares near its Tipicancha target within the Sombrero Project in Peru. These concessions, known as the "Horizonte Concessions," are situated in an area where Coppernico believes its expanding Tipicancha epithermal-porphyry system extends beyond the current project boundaries. In 2025, as discussions about the Horizonte Concessions were underway, Coppernico secured an additional 1,400 hectares of surrounding mineral concessions. This combined land package significantly enhances the company's position at Tipicancha, a high-priority target due to strong signs of potential porphyry source at depth.

data.title: RO OFFERS ELI LILLY'S FOUNDAYO™, THE NEWEST GLP-1 INNOVATION
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 9, 2026, Ro, a top direct-to-patient healthcare company, revealed that eligible patients can now utilize Foundayo™ (orforglipron) from Eli Lilly as a new once daily pill option. This move also involves an expansion of Ro's weight loss formulary. This initiative aims to offer enhanced treatment options to patients seeking effective weight loss solutions.

data.title: Cook Street School of Culinary Arts Announces New Professional Pastry Arts Program in Denver
data.description: A comprehensive eight-week program in Denver starting on April 9, 2026, combines classical and modern pastry techniques with hands-on practice and career guidance. Cook Street School of Culinary Arts is offering this intensive course for aspiring pastry professionals and dedicated home bakers. The program covers various aspects of pastry arts and provides essential support for career advancement.

data.title: Cyngn Accelerates Autonomous Vehicle Adoption in 2026
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in Mountain View, California, Cyngn (NASDAQ: CYN) announced significant commercial growth as industrial AI integration moves from small trials to widespread implementation in businesses. Cyngn has experienced a rise in bookings and extended its reach over the last year.

Hezbollah has fired some 30 rockets from Lebanon at northern Israel since this morning, according to the IDF. There have been no reports of injuries or damage as the rockets were either intercepted or allowed to strike open areas.

data.title: VSBLTY Announces Contract Award and Initial Deployment of Multi-Sensor Governed Intelligence Platform for Defense Early-Warning, Counter Drone, and Critical Infrastructure Protection
data.description: Philadelphia-based VSBLTY Groupe Technologies Corp. (OTC: VSBGF) (CSE: VSBY) (Frankfurt: 5VS), a company specializing in AI-powered multi-sensor data fusion, edge computing, and governed operational intelligence platforms for defense, counter drone, and critical infrastructure protection, has recently signed a contract and received an initial purchase order from CRS Inc., a U.S.-based systems integrator. This partnership aims to support the deployment of an undisclosed solution.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- NAPHIA/
data.description: The renowned pet photographer and social media influencer, The Dogist, has been announced as the closing keynote speaker for NAPHIA Engage 2026. This announcement was made by NAPHIA on 08-Apr-2026. The decision to select The Dogist as the keynote speaker marks a significant change in the event lineup. Attendees can look forward to insights and perspectives from The Dogist during the closing session. Further details about the event and The Dogist's participation will be revealed closer to the date.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 9, 2026
data.description: Before the market opens, a few companies are set to release their quarterly earnings reports. Neogen (NEOG) is projected to announce earnings of $0.04 per share with revenue around $204.55 million. Root (ROOT) is expected to report earnings of $0.03 per share with revenue of $68.69 million. BlackBerry (BB) is anticipated to report earnings of $0.04 per share with revenue of $144.55 million. Simply Good Foods (SMPL) is estimated to reveal earnings of $0.38 per share on revenue of $344.39 million. Additionally, 111 (YI) and Northern Technologies (NTIC) are also expected to announce their quarterly earnings. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CoreWeave Announces Intention to Offer $1,250 million of Senior Notes
data.description: Livingston, New Jersey - CoreWeave, Inc. disclosed plans to launch a private offering of $1,250 million aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2031. The company, listed as Nasdaq: CRWV, intends for the Notes to be backed by specific wholly-owned subsidiaries on a senior unsecured basis. CoreWeave aims to utilize the funds generated from the offering, expected to be subject to normal market conditions, for various corporate objectives.

data.title: eDreams ODIGEO Expands International Footprint With Subscription Service in South Africa Following Proven Market Success
data.description: In Spain, eDreams ODIGEO (eDO) has revealed the expansion of its Prime subscription service in South Africa, marking a significant development in the region's growth strategy. The company, listed as BME: EDR and OTC: EDDRF, is a global travel subscription platform that has been promoting its Prime offering to South African consumers for over a year. The positive performance metrics collected during this period have confirmed the demand and suitability of the local market for a travel subscription model. This milestone indicates a shift towards a comprehensive expansion phase in the region.

data.title: Nexstar Media Group to Report 2026 First Quarter Financial Results, Host Conference Call and Webcast on May 7
data.description: Nexstar Media Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: NXST) based in Irving, Texas, is set to release its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 7th. The company will hold a conference call and webcast at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing 1-877-407-9208 or 1-201-493-6784 with the conference ID 13759681 for both domestic and international callers. Additionally, a live webcast of the call will be available for participants to tune in.

data.title: CoStar Group Ranked No. 1 on Washington Business Journal’s List of Women on Public Company Boards
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), a prominent online real estate marketplace, information, and analytics provider, has secured the top spot on the Washington Business Journal's yearly ranking. They hold the position of No. 1 among public companies for having the highest presence of women on their boards of directors. This achievement underscores CoStar Group's dedication to establishing a board that exceeds the norms of corporate governance rather than just fulfilling them. Their commitment to diversity within leadership is evident, showcasing their strong emphasis on gender equality and representation in the corporate realm.
